main.description: Exchange an access grant for a space credential. Called on the space owner's PDS. The grant is presented as the request's authorization token. The host asks its configured space-management implementation whether to authorize a credential for this user and app, then signs. Optionally pass `notifyEndpoint` to register the requesting service to receive write notifications for this space. The space credential can be used to read data from member PDSes.

notifyEndpoint.description: Optional endpoint where the requesting service should receive write notifications for this space. If omitted, the service will not receive notifyWrite events.

errors.name: UserNotAuthorized
errors.description: The host's space-management implementation refused the credential on the basis of the requesting user/DID.

errors.name: AppNotAuthorized
errors.description: The host's space-management implementation refused the credential on the basis of the requesting app/client.

errors.name: NotAuthorized
errors.description: The host's space-management implementation refused the credential for a reason not attributable to a single axis.
